content: BP demonstrates solid disclosure practices for GHG emissions, providing quantified operational control figures of 34.3 MtCO2e for 2024, while regulatory records from the EU ETS show no violations across 9 records. However, with only two of five evidence streams active and insufficient talent posting data to assess operational commitment, the overall credibility assessment carries moderate confidence. The words-money analysis found only one of six commitments verifiable as consistent, though this reflects data limitations rather than a confirmed gap between stated ambitions and financial backing.
